issues.title: Manual verification Step 3.4 conflicts with known limitation
issues.attack: Tab click doesn't dispatch tabChanged, so ring removal verification in Step 3.4 will always fail
issues.response: Correct. Will revise Step 3 to use funnel navigation path that dispatches tabChanged

issues.title: Tests only verify markup, not actual new-indicator behavior
issues.attack: Goal says 'test functionality works correctly' but tests only check data attributes in HTML, not JS behavior
issues.response: Valid. Will narrow Goal to 'markup regression test (auto) + behavior verification (manual)'

issues.title: Assertions too loose — whole-page string search
issues.attack: assert 'data-badge-count' in content matches any occurrence on page, not specific to contacts tab
issues.response: Valid. Will strengthen to verify attributes within specific tab button contexts

issues.title: Missing tabs in data-tab assertion (4 of 6)
issues.attack: Template has 6 tabs but test only checks 4, missing search and offers

issues.title: No negative case — badge absent when count=0
issues.attack: No test verifies badge is absent when tab_counts=0 despite conditional rendering
issues.response: Valid. Will add negative test for empty project

issues.title: Manual verification lacks sessionStorage initialization
issues.attack: Step 3 doesn't specify clearing sessionStorage, leading to inconsistent results
issues.response: Valid. Will add prerequisite for fresh browser state
